hooks.command: jq -r '{session_id: .session_id, stop_reason: .stop_reason, timestamp: now | todate}' | curl -s -X POST http://localhost:4820/api/hooks/event -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- > /dev/null 2>&1 || true

jq -r '{session_id: .session_id, agent_id: .agent_id, stop_reason: .stop_reason, timestamp: now | todate}' | curl -s -X POST http://localhost:4820/api/hooks/event -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- > /dev/null 2>&1 || true
